title: helianthus trachaefolius
intro: Helianthus trachaefolius, also known as the rough-leaved sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Helianthus trachaefolius can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
